title: Beach field-season integration phase
summary: Beach is the only biome with zero field request routes. This lane-1 wave adds beach participation in the guided field-season loop through one starter-grade beach beat on the existing season board, plus a compact beach station-return warmth pass.

execution_order.goal: Prepare a beach field-season integration handoff.
execution_order.why_now: Beach is the only biome with no routes; the field season feels incomplete without it.
The season board has no beach presence and front-half players can miss the field-season entirely.
Ensure the beat fits the existing board shape without dashboard drift.

execution_order.goal: Prepare a beach station-return warmth handoff.
execution_order.why_now: Beach needs station-return parity with inland biomes.
Returning from beach to the station should feel as guided as returning from forest or treeline.
Gate before front-half station cohesion can build on this.

guardrails: Beach beat must use the existing season-board shape, not add a new surface.
Do not add a fourth beat row to the coastal season board.
No new station pages or dashboard expansion.
Station-return copy must stay compact and use existing notice seams.
Beach beat should complement lane-4 beach route work, not duplicate it.
